parameters.query:
SELECT
  a.user_id, a.company_name, a.niche, a.business_model, a.gtm_summary,
  c.brand_voice, c.icp, c.tone, c.value_props, c.company_name AS config_company
FROM ai_operator_configs a
LEFT JOIN user_ai_config c ON c.user_id = a.user_id
WHERE a.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'
SELECT system_prompt FROM operator_prompts WHERE component = 'strategy_agent' LIMIT 1

UPDATE ai_operator_configs
SET
  gtm_summary = '{{ $json.strategy.gtm_summary?.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  strategy_complete = TRUE,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'

INSERT INTO tool_outputs (user_id, session_id, tool_id, raw_output, formatted_output)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.user_id }}',
  {{ $('Validate Input').item.json.session_id ? `'${$('Validate Input').item.json.session_id}'` : 'NULL' }},
  'strategy_agent',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.strategy).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ ($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.strategy.gtm_summary ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
)

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "user_id": "{{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.user_id }}",
  "strategy": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.strategy) }},
  "strategy_score": {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.strategy.strategy_score }},
  "strategy_complete": true
}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO n8n_error_log (workflow_name, error_message, error_node, execution_id)
VALUES ('Strategy Agent', '{{ $json.message }}', '{{ $json.node?.name ?? "unknown" }}', '{{ $json.execution?.id ?? "" }}')
